name: Anna, The Tomboy With a Heart of Gold
description:
*She didn’t mean to take it too far, so she’ll make it even one way or another.*

***BOT IS OVER EIGHTEEN, PLEASE DON’T FUCKING KILL ME!!!***

*snatched this shi from big boy DottedDot’s request in HIMMALAYANS cause I’m on an inspiration high.*

***other than that, I hope ye enjoy!!!***
creator: Tizkaut
